person.name: Jeanne de Châteauvillain

memoryArtifacts.headline: Chateauvillain Jeanne Dame en robe manteau vairé, coiffure carrée fleur de lys à la main droite,la gauche à l'attache du manteau
Châteauvillain De gueules semé de billettes d'or au lion du même brochant sur le tout.

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Jeanne de Châteauvillain sceau 1261 :
Dame debout, en robe et manteau vairé, coiffure carrée ; tenant une fleur de lys à la main droite, et la gauche à l'attache de son manteau.
Sceau du secret :
Écu au lion rampant sur champ billeté.
Armoirie de Châteauvillain : De gueules semé de billettes d'or au lion du même brochant sur le tout.
relevé 2022 JPR Teyssier Chalancon

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Châteauvillain於1325年出生在法國德 艾斯特豪-馬內a奧維利亞時，她的父親Jean III de Châteauvillain31歲，母親Marguerite De Noyers21歲。她於1345年與Jean Ier de Thil在法國德 艾斯特豪-馬內a奧維利亞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1389年在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內a奧維利亞享年64歲。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Châteauvillain was born in 1325, in Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, France, her father, Jean III de Châteauvillain, was 31 and her mother, Marguerite De Noyers, was 21. She married Jean Ier de Thil in 1345, in Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1389, in Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Châteauvillain est née en 1325, à Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, France, son père, Jean III de Châteauvillain, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Marguerite De Noyers, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Jean Ier de Thil en 1345, à Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1389, à Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Châteauvillain 1325 in Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean III de Châteauvillain 31 und ihre Mutter Marguerite De Noyers 21. Sie hat 1345 in Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich Jean Ier de Thil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1389 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Châteauvillain è nata il nel 1325 nel Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Jean III de Châteauvillain, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Marguerite De Noyers, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Jean Ier de Thil nel 1345, nel Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1389, nel Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Châteauvillainが1325年にフランスグランド エストハウテ-マルンチaテアウヴィレインで生まれた時，父Jean III de Châteauvillainは31歳，母Marguerite De Noyersは21歳であった。1345年にフランスグランド エストハウテ-マルンチaテアウヴィレインでJean Ier de Thilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1389年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンチaテアウヴィレインで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Châteauvillain(이)가 1325년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 하테-마니 cha테오비린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean III de Châteauvillain(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite De Noyers(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1345년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 하테-마니 cha테오비린에서 Jean Ier de Thil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1389년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 cha테오비린에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Châteauvillain nasceu em 1325, em Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Jean III de Châteauvillain, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite De Noyers, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean Ier de Thil em 1345, em Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1389, em Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Châteauvillain родилась в 1325 г. в местности чaтовиллеин, хауте-марн, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean III de Châteauvillain было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Marguerite De Noyers, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean Ier de Thil в 1345 г. в местности чaтовиллеин, хауте-марн, гранд эст, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1389 г. в местности чaтовиллеин, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Châteauvillain nació en 1325, en Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Jean III de Châteauvillain, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Marguerite De Noyers, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jean Ier de Thil en 1345, en Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1389, en Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 64 años.
